1.description: get Stavanger municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect AR50 agriculture category codes (distinct values)

3.description: get AR50 polygons filtered by the chosen agriculture code(s) (national, unfiltered by municipality)

4.description: reduce AR50 agricultural polygons to Stavanger extent by intersecting with municipality geometry

5.description: get teig parcels for Stavanger (filter by kommunenummer)

6.description: find teig parcels that intersect agricultural AR50 polygons

7.description: collapse to one row per teigid (deduplicate) by counting matches

9.description: return first 10 parcels sorted by teigid

SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Stavanger%'
LIMIT 1;

FROM public."0000_25833_ar50_gdb__ar50"
WHERE arjordbr = '24';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

1.description: get Stavanger municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect AR50 arjordbr distinct values to find agricultural code

3.description: get AR50 polygons for agricultural land reduced to Stavanger extent

5.description: find parcels that intersect agricultural AR50 polygons

6.description: collapse to one row per teigid (group by teigid)
